title: FunkyClient
description: A clean, client-side modpack made to enhance Minecraft’s visuals, performance, and quality of life — without changing vanilla gameplay. Perfect for chill singleplayer or playing with friends on servers. Includes all the mods, resource packs, and shaders I
body:
![FunkyClient Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7edebef42c302d6d6b2a606def7d6cca11faf511.png)
## 👑 FunkyClient

😍 This modpack is perfect for enjoying Minecraft with friends on servers or just chilling in singleplayer. The purpose of this pack is to enhance Minecraft while keeping it true to vanilla — it doesn’t add new gameplay content, only client-side improvements for visuals, performance, and quality of life.

👨‍🏫 It includes all the mods, resource packs, and the shader I use every time I play Minecraft. Anytime I make changes, I’ll update this modpack so it always reflects exactly what I use.



## ✨ What’s Inside?

### 🖼️ Visual & Vibe Enhancers

Complementary Shaders + Iris ☀️

Visuality, Falling Leaves, Cave Dust, Armor Chroma, Enchantment Outlines

Drippy Loading Screen, Better Clouds, 3D Skin Layers, Chat Animation, Fresh Animations

### 🎧 Immersive Audio

AmbientSounds, Melody, Sound Physics Remastered, Sparkle!, Sounds 🎶

Make the world feel alive

### 🛠️ Performance Boosters

Sodium, Lithium, FerriteCore, Entity Culling, More Culling, ImmediatelyFast ⚙️

FPS Display to keep it real

### 🧰 Quality of Life Tweaks

AppleSkin, Durability Tooltip, Shulker Box Tooltip, InvMove, Mouse Tweaks

RightClickHarvest, Hold My Items, Pick Up Notifier, Cherished Worlds

Fullbright with Gamma Utils 🌕

BetterF3 and Mod Menu for clean control

### ⚔️ Combat & Gear Overhaul

YDM’s Weapon Master 🔪

Viper’s Enchantment Overhaul for better looking books

blob’s Enchant Icons, Not Enough Animations, Better Third Person for smooth fighting

### 🗺️ Exploration Tools

Xaero’s Minimap + World Map 🧭

Visible Traders, Villager Trading Plus

Glowing Ores! to make mining easyier
